variables.notes: Chose exact total current liabilities line.

No clear non-lease short-term debt/current borrowings line is reported. 'Current lease liabilities' is explicitly excluded from STD under the baseline rule, and other current liability lines are not debt.

No clear balance-sheet line for taxes payable/current tax liabilities. 'Public duties payable' appears to be broader statutory/payroll/VAT-related obligations rather than a clean income taxes payable line.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet measure of total tangible fixed assets; closest to total/net PPE under IFRS presentation.
